name: pupfish-qlik
description: Qlik Sense development toolkit: 12 practitioner-authored skills covering data modeling, load scripts, expressions, performance, visualization, QA, source profiling, and Cloud MCP integration. Includes 7 specialist agents (data architect, script developer, expression developer, viz architect, requirements analyst, QA reviewer, doc writer) for ad-hoc invocation. No rigid workflow — invoke skills and agents as needed.
